headlines.headline: Halvax Networks sees 25% margin improvement in latest quarter

sentiment.reasoning: A 25% margin improvement indicates strong operational efficiency and immediate profitability gains.

sentiment.reasoning: Routine patent filings are standard business operations and do not imply immediate financial impact.

headlines.headline: Brevon Microchips CFO steps down unexpectedly citing personal reasons

sentiment.reasoning: An unexpected CFO departure typically triggers market concern regarding internal stability and financial oversight.

headlines.headline: Halvax Networks announces $0.8B share buyback program

sentiment.reasoning: A large share buyback program signals management confidence and provides immediate support for the stock price.

headlines.headline: Relvan Software reports record quarterly revenue, up 15% year-over-year

sentiment.reasoning: Record revenue growth of 15% demonstrates strong market demand and positive momentum for the company.

headlines.headline: Halvax Networks announces $1.2B share buyback program

sentiment.reasoning: An increased share buyback program further reinforces capital return commitments and positive sentiment.

scoring.methodology: Gemini scores only the effect implied by the headline text itself, then separates immediate reaction versus later carry-through within the same 100-day session.
